highlights.description: Go client SDK for mem0 with support for hosted (api.mem0.ai) deployments
OmniMemory provider implementation for vendor-neutral memory abstraction

added.description: OpenAPI spec for mem0 hosted API
Ogen code generation script for client generation
Core types for memory operations (Message, MemoryItem, SearchResult, etc.)
Functional options for client and operations (WithAPIKey, WithUserID, etc.)
Configuration loading from environment variables (MEM0_API_KEY, MEM0_BASE_URL)
Error types and helpers (APIError, IsNotFoundError, etc.)
Memory interface definition with Add, Get, GetAll, Search, Update, Delete, History operations
Client factory with authHTTPClient wrapper for API authentication
Hosted backend implementation wrapping ogen client

fixed.description: Add nolint directives for gosec false positives (G704 SSRF, G101 credentials)

tests.description: Unit tests and examples for client, errors, types
OmniMemory provider tests with conformance testing

documentation.description: README with quickstart guide and usage examples
README badges for pkg.go.dev, license, and CI status

dependencies.description: Add omnimemory dependency for provider interface
